treatment_information.treatment_response: UTI was treated, but patient had increased symptoms of cognitive decline.
Administered to address hyponatremia; patient showed some improvement.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient diagnosed with UTI and started on Macrobid.
Patient had 1L Normal Saline administered in the ED.
Patient monitored for sodium levels during hospitalization.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient advised to follow up with physician to monitor sodium levels.
patient_outcome.complications: Patient had a fall during hospitalization while getting up to go to the bathroom.
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient enjoyed physical therapy and word-finding games during hospitalization.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient's confusion improved during hospitalization but is believed to be due to worsening dementia.
